---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new cognitive training game, metric, or visual enhancement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe (e.g., *"I'm frustrated when training speed because..."*).

## Proposed Feature / Game Concept
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. 
* If this is a new game, please specify the **Cognitive Domain** (Memory, Attention, Speed, Executive, Verbal, Spatial), design color, and basic stimulus-response mechanics.

## User Experience (UX) Flow
Explain how the user will interact with this feature:
1. Entry point (e.g. Train Screen filter pill)
2. Game layout / Active workflow
3. Metrics & Session completion results layout

## Design Mockups / Visuals
Add any conceptual diagrams, UI wireframes, or reference imagery to illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context
Add any other thoughts, psychological research references, or architectural implications here.
